shortDescription: Immigration NZ · Points-based PR · EOI · Job offer or skilled employment

policyAlert.summary: Confirm current SMC points requirements and fees on immigration.govt.nz. Expression of Interest selection depends on points threshold—never promise selection.

alert.title: EOI selection not guaranteed
alert.body: Submitting Expression of Interest does not guarantee selection. Points threshold varies each ballot—counsel on realistic points before fees.

about.label: Description
about.value: Permanent residence pathway for skilled workers with qualifications and experience needed in New Zealand. Points-based Expression of Interest (EOI) system with periodic selection.

about.label: Eligible applicants
about.value: Skilled employment or job offer · Points meeting selection threshold · Age typically under 55 · English competency · Health and character · Qualifications assessment if required

about.label: Selection threshold varies
about.value: INZ selects EOIs above certain points at each ballot. Threshold changes—verify recent selections.

about.label: After approval
about.value: Permanent residence visa; live and work in New Zealand indefinitely subject to travel conditions on initial visa.

eligibility.criterion: Skilled job offer or current skilled employment in NZ
Points meet or exceed recent selection threshold

redFlagsBanner: Without EOI selection, do not lodge residence application. Improve points via NZ employment, qualification level, or work experience before expecting selection.

redFlags.title: Points below selection threshold
redFlags.description: EOI submitted but recent selections at higher points.
redFlags.fix: Gain NZ skilled work experience; improve English; partner qualifications

redFlags.title: Job not skilled (ANZSCO)
redFlags.description: Occupation below skill level 1–3 or not on green list.
redFlags.fix: Verify ANZSCO skill level and green list eligibility

redFlags.title: Qualification not recognised
redFlags.description: Overseas qualification not assessed or equivalent.

redFlags.title: Age over 55
redFlags.description: Zero age points; difficult to reach threshold.

redFlags.title: EOI selected but docs not ready
redFlags.fix: Prepare document templates while EOI in pool

faqs.q: Can we guarantee SMC selection or PR?
faqs.a: No. EOI selection depends on points and INZ ballot. Never promise selection or approval.
Check recent INZ selection announcements—threshold varies each ballot.
Skilled employment in NZ or job offer typically required—verify current SMC rules.
Some occupations on Green List have simplified residence pathways—assess separately.
Partner qualifications and skilled employment may add points.
Typically several months—verify current INZ processing times.
Generally need NZ job offer or be in NZ on eligible visa—verify current rules.
For many overseas qualifications—verify if needed for points claim.

compliance: Client service agreement and consent must be on file before submission
Never guarantee visa or immigration approval; use approved-language only
Fee quotes must separate consultancy, government, and third-party costs
proTips: Calculate points with official INZ calculator
Verify ANZSCO skill level for occupation
Complete NZQA assessment early if needed
Prepare docs while EOI in pool
postApproval: Explain travel conditions on initial visa

timeline.title: NZQA assessment if needed, EOI submission

relatedServices.label: New Zealand – Post Study Work Visa

changelog.author: Service Library
changelog.summary: Expanded quiz to 75 levelled questions (25 per level).

changelog.author: Service Library
changelog.summary: Initial NZ Skilled Migrant Category counselor content.

staffNotes.author: Documentation team
staffNotes.text: Check Green List separately—some occupations have faster residence pathway than standard SMC.

quiz.question: SMC uses:
options: Random lottery only
Points-based EOI selection
No assessment
Employer choice only
quiz.explanation: Points-based system.

quiz.question: EOI selection guaranteed at minimum points:
options: Yes
No—depends on ballot threshold
Always
Automatic
quiz.explanation: Selection not guaranteed.

quiz.question: Skilled occupation must meet:
options: Any job
ANZSCO skill level requirements
No job needed
Volunteer only
quiz.explanation: Skilled employment required.

quiz.question: Age over 55 typically:
options: Gets maximum points
Receives zero age points
Automatic PR
No effect
quiz.explanation: Age points reduce/disappear.

quiz.question: Counselors must never:
options: Calculate points
Guarantee selection or PR
Check Green List
Monitor ballots
quiz.explanation: No guarantees.

sampleDocs.title: Sample passport bio page (mock)
sampleDocs.description: Show clients which pages to scan — MRZ visible, no glare, full spread.

sampleDocs.title: Sample language test TRF (mock)
sampleDocs.description: IELTS / PTE / TOEFL layout — explain CLB or points mapping.

sampleDocs.title: Sample ECA report (mock)
sampleDocs.description: WES / IQAS / ICAS credential assessment — degree equivalency page.

sampleDocs.title: Sample employment reference letter (mock)
sampleDocs.description: Duties, NOC code, dates, and full-time hours on company letterhead.

sampleDocs.title: Sample resume / CV (mock)
sampleDocs.description: Skilled migration format — chronological roles and NOC alignment.

sampleDocs.title: Sample nomination / job offer letter (mock)
sampleDocs.description: PNP nomination or employer-backed offer where applicable.

sampleDocs.title: Sample bank statement (mock)
sampleDocs.description: 6-month statement with name, account number, and closing balance — explain seasoning.
